description: Template loading: resolve, load, render environment variables for agent templates (template_loader.py:1)

key_interfaces.name: resolve_template_dir
key_interfaces.description: Resolve template directory by name (user dir priority over built-in), raises TemplateNotFoundError

key_interfaces.name: load_template
key_interfaces.description: Load template.toml metadata, returns dict with 'template' and 'hooks' keys

key_interfaces.name: render_env
key_interfaces.description: Render .env.example with context ({{placeholder}} substitution), overlay .env user overrides

key_interfaces.name: get_start_script
key_interfaces.description: Return absolute path to template's start.sh, raises FileNotFoundError

key_interfaces.name: list_templates
key_interfaces.description: List all templates (user + built-in, deduplicated) with source tag

key_interfaces.name: _parse_env_file
key_interfaces.description: Parse .env file into dict using python-dotenv

key_interfaces.name: TemplateNotFoundError
key_interfaces.description: Exception raised when template not found

user_flows.name: list available templates
steps: load template.toml for each, tag with source
